MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION TO FIX AMOUNT OF ADDITIONAL ATTORNEYS' FEES AWARDABLE UNDER CONTRACT. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED -- DEFENDANT DEL MONTE CORP.'S MOTION TO FIX AMOUNT OF ADDITIONAL ATTORNEY'S FEES AWARDABLE UNDER CONTRACT IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. ADDITIONAL $155,887.65 ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS INCURRED SINCE OCTOBER 10, 2000 IS AWARDED TO DEFENDANTS. HON. A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT ISSUED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT DEFENDANT DEL MONTE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM PLAINTIFF PREMIER VALLEY FOODS INC $517,300.94 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $517,300.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

Off Calendar Sep-18-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
* No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendant DEL MONTE CORP.'s motion to fix amount of additional attorney's fees awardable under contract is GRANTED, no opposition filed. Additional $155,887.65 attorneys fees and costs incurred since October 10, 2000 is awarded to defendants. (AJR/301) Hon. A. JAMES ROBERTSON II (301) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855
